approved_control.objective: Perform implementation-level benchmark trust repair: identify and remove or control Python TLS proxy send scheduling pollution, fixed client-order bias, small-sample outlier amplification, and mean-throughput aggregation distortion; then update tests, results, README/report evidence, and the SOTA claim decision.
approved_control.what_counts_as_done: The benchmark trust repair is done only when all required outcomes and result paths are directly evidenced: contamination audit completed; fixture or equivalent control implemented; client execution order bias controlled; paired aggregation, confidence intervals, and outlier/anomaly gates implemented; proxy send time and trace attribution included in result artifacts; tests pass; a new benchmark or controlled diagnostic matrix is run and compared with gen005; README/report evidence is updated; final Counterexample Gate passes; and the final report explicitly decides whether the SOTA claim is preserved, downgraded, or withdrawn under the repaired benchmark.

required_steps.transition: Audit existing HTTPS proxy benchmark contamination sources and classify Python proxy send timing, fixed order, small samples, and aggregation distortion.
Implement a stable proxy/origin fixture or equivalent controls so canonical results are attributable to client behavior.
Implement client ordering control plus paired aggregation and confidence/uncertainty reporting.
Persist trace attribution fields and enforce proxy send time anomaly gates before any SOTA verdict.
Run focused semantic tests covering benchmark ordering, trace parsing, anomaly gates, paired stats, and figure data semantics.
Run or import repaired benchmark evidence and compare it with old gen005 evidence including the 0.890x cell.
Update README/report/figure evidence chain and decide preserve, downgrade, or withdraw SOTA under repaired evidence.
Run final independent Counterexample Gate and enforce human gates for claim-changing push/tag/live/external actions.

invalidated_evidence: gen005 0.890x cell is diagnostic/historical only until repaired gates rerun or import run-local evidence
